recent_excerpts: Microsoft released out-of-band updates for Windows Server 2019 and 2022 after April 2026 security patches caused boot failures and domain controller authentication issues, forcing some administrators
Microsoft's April 2026 Patch Tuesday adds a critical warning dialog to Windows Remote Desktop, blocking threat actors from using malicious .rdp files to steal credentials via phishing.

Microsoft's Windows 11 Dev Build 26300.8170 adds a dedicated Secure Boot monitoring panel to the Windows Security app, providing administrators with a single-pane view of the firmware security feature
